title: Bomb squad detonate 'suspicious package' at RAF Lossiemouth

sections.heading: Incident Overview
sections.content: The Royal Air Force's Lossiemouth base in Moray was the site of heightened security measures after a suspicious package was discovered. This package came to light during a regular security search on the premises.

sections.heading: Emergency Response
sections.content: In response to the find, a bomb disposal unit was deployed to the scene. Authorities acted quickly, ensuring the area was cordoned off to maintain public safety while investigations were underway.

sections.heading: Outcome
sections.content: The package was detonated by the bomb squad, who assessed the situation in accordance with protocol. No further details about the package or its contents have been released.

sourceReferences.citationText: bbc-scotland – Bomb squad detonate 'suspicious package' at RAF Lossiemouth
